name: insurance_mutual_aid_request_marrowbridge_st_lt
premise: A Insurance response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving insurance mutual aid request marrowbridge st lt. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as short term vs long term under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Elena Dubois
agents.identity: I am Elena Dubois, accountable for a defensible call in Insurance when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays long term for short term.

agents.name: Ravi Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Ravi Ishikawa, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Insurance.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so long term isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of short term.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect long term.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to long term to secure short term under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Evidence is partial. Elena Dubois must decide under short term vs long term. What does Elena Dubois do?
